name: ai-system-builder
description: AI System Builder · Google/AWS Summit multi-stop demo (see ../ai-system-builder-design.md)

scripts.build: npm --workspace shared run build && npm --workspace client run build && npm --workspace server run build
scripts.lint: npm --workspace client run lint && npm --workspace server run lint
scripts.db:migrate: echo 'Run supabase/migrations/*.sql via Supabase dashboard or CLI'
